title: Archon Renewed
description: Sorcery, Necromancy, Bosses, and More, now Renewed!
body:
**Archon Renewed is a fork of the original [Archon](https://github.com/Safrodev/Archon) mod created by Safro. The goal of the fork is fixing bugs and introducing some QOL improvements to the original mod.**

All credit for the base code and assets goes to Safro. If you find any issues, please report them to my GitHub.

---
**Archon is an elemental based magic mod for Fabric 1.20.1.**

**It includes:**
- A Unique Mana System
- Elemental Weapons with Abilities
- Spellcasting system with unique spells
- Necromancy
- Helpful Miscellaneous Items
- Summonable Bosses
- And More!

**If you have Patchouli installed, you can craft a Grimoire to view all about the content. Archon uses the Spell Power system for spell scaling and to enhance compatibility with other Fabric magic mods.**

---
#### Requires:
- Spell Power Attributes

#### Recommended Mods:
- Patchouli: Allows you to use the guide book
- REI: Allows you to view all recipes

#### Compatible Mods:
- EMI: REI alternative

---
### FAQ & Tips


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Q: Can I configure this mod?

- A: Yes, you can find a config file in your run folder. You can configure many aspects of the mod, including the mana display position.

1. You may add other mobs to the tags c:bosses, archon:creatures, and archon:players to allow souls to be dropped from modded mobs.

2. You can customize the maximum mana of individual players by using the /mana setMax command

3. To increase the difficulty of a modpack, it is recommended you adjust spell recipes to make them harder to craft

</details>
